metadata.description: A male-presenting individual in their 50s-60s has fair, slightly ruddy skin with visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is short, curly, and thick, a salt-and-pepper mix of dark gray and black, receding slightly at the temples. Green eyes are almond-shaped and set normally, beneath thick, dark, slightly bushy eyebrows. The nose is medium-sized with a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness with a neutral shape. A full, neatly trimmed beard and mustache, predominantly white-gray, covers the lower face. The overall appearance suggests a person of European descent. The expression is neutral, with the head turned slightly to the right, looking directly at the viewer.
